---
title: 'BridgeQG Vade Mecum'
---

```mindmap-graph
Vade Mecum {shape:circle} -> Violation and Deformation of Relativistic Symmetries {url:/VadeMecum/doc/LIV_DSR.html}
Vade Mecum -> In-vacuo dispersion {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Invacuo_dispersion.html}
Vade Mecum -> Second level topics {shape:circle, color:#fdbcce}
<!--Vade Mecum -> Examples {shape:circle, color:#daffcc}-->

Second level topics -> Quantum Gravity Scale {url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/QGscale.html}
Second level topics -> Time delays {url:/VadeMecum/doc/2ndlevel/time_delay.html}

Examples -> How to use the Wiki {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Examples/example0.html}
Examples -> How to write QMarkdown {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Examples/example1.html}
Examples -> How to write LaTeX {url:/VadeMecum/doc/Examples/example2.html}
```
